zh.Canterbury St. Augustine, Canterbury, Ke: 英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 奧古斯丁
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Mantell於1489年出生在英國英格蘭肯特比曉普斯布恩時，他的父親John Mantell25歲，母親Ursula Button21歲。他於1515年與Margaret Wood在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年1月12日在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 奧古斯丁享年49歲，埋葬在英國肯特比曉普斯布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Mantell于1489年出生在英国英格兰肯特比曉普斯布恩时，他的父亲John Mantell25岁，母亲Ursula Button21岁。他于1515年与Margaret Wood在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年1月12日在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 聖 奧古斯丁享年49岁，埋葬在英国肯特比曉普斯布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Mantell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Asher, Elihu, Yetta.
English (southern) and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Mantel  . The historic English pronunciation has the stress on the first syllable, more recently on the second.
Americanized form of German, French, and Dutch   Mantel  .

variants.name: Mantel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Menachem, Shlomo.

English, German, French, and Dutch: nickname for someone who wore a cloak in a particularly conspicuous way or with a striking design, from Middle English, Middle High German, Old French, and Middle Dutch mantel ‘cloak, coat’ (from Late Latin mantellus). It may sometimes have named a cloak maker.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): probably from German Mantel or Yiddish mantl ‘coat’; see 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Mantell was born in 1489, in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Mantell, was 25 and his mother, Ursula Button, was 21. He married Margaret Wood in 1515, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 12 January 1538, in Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England.

fr.Canterbury St. Augustine, Canterbury, Ke: Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Mantell est né en 1489, à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mantell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ursula Button, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Wood en 1515, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1538, à Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Canterbury St. Augustine, Canterbury, Ke: Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Mantell 1489 in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mantell 25 und seine Mutter Ursula Button 21. Er hat 1515 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Margaret Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Januar 1538 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Mantell è nato il nel 1489 nel Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Mantell, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ursula Button, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Wood nel 1515, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 12 gennaio 1538, nel Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishopsbourne, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Mantellが1489年にイギリスイギリスケントビショプスボウルンで生まれた時，父John Mantellは25歳，母Ursula Buttonは21歳であった。1515年にイギリスイギリスケントでMargaret Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1538年1月12日にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー スト アウグスティンで49歳で死去し，イギリスケントビショプスボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Canterbury St. Augustine, Canterbury, Ke: 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 오구스틴
ko.lifeSummary: Walter Mantell(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비숍스번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mantell(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ursula Button(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Margaret Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 1월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 스트 오구스틴에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 비숍스번에 묻혔다.

pt.Canterbury St. Augustine, Canterbury, Ke: Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Mantell nasceu em 1489, em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mantell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ursula Button, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Wood em 1515, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1538, em Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Canterbury St. Augustine, Canterbury, Ke: кантирбури ст аугустаин, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Mantell родился в 1489 г. в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Mantell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ursula Button, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Wood в 1515 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 12 января 1538 г. в местности кантирбури ст аугустаин, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Mantell nació en 1489, en Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mantell, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ursula Button, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Wood en 1515, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 12 de enero de 1538, en Canterbury St Augustine, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra.
